entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE WorkflowLaunch PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <WorkflowLaunch status="failed" workflowName="HR Source Joiner event" workflowRef="HR Source Joiner event"> <Messages> <Message key="err_exception" type="Error"> <Parameters> <Message key="Error in method invocation: Method add(sailpoint.object.Attributes) not found in class'sailpoint.object.ProvisioningPlan$AttributeRequest' : at Line: 40 " type="Error"/> </Parameters> </Message> </Messages> <TaskResultRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.TaskResult" id="HR Source Joiner event - 13" name="HR Source Joiner event - 13"/> </TaskResultRef> <WorkflowCaseRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.WorkflowCase" name="HR Source Joiner event"/> </WorkflowCaseRef> </WorkflowLaunch>
